languages.text: "Ясно. Значит, через пару поколений мы вернемся к тому, с чего начали. Офицеры будут пить амасек и жить в личных покоях, а простые солдаты будут загибаться на грязных койках. Вы уж как хотите, но я остаток жизни положу на то, чтобы традиция Тренировочного Боя не померла. Так будет хоть какой-то шанс, что полк не забудет своих корней".

"I see. So, in a couple of Call-Ups, we'll be right back where we started. Officers sipping amasec in their private quarters while the common soldiers rot in their filthy cots. You do what you want, but I'm spending the rest of my life making sure the Trial Match tradition continues. It's the only chance we have of keeping the regiment from forgetting its roots."
languages.original_text: "Ясно. Значит, через пару поколений мы вернемся к тому, с чего начали. Офицеры будут пить амасек и жить в личных покоях, а простые солдаты будут загибаться на грязных койках. Вы уж как хотите, но я остаток жизни положу на то, чтобы традиция Тренировочного Боя не померла. Так будет хоть какой-то шанс, что полк не забудет своих корней".

traits.locale_text: "I see. So, in a couple of generations, we'll be right back where we started. Officers sipping amasec in their private quarters while the common soldiers rot on filthy cots. You do what you want, but I'm spending the rest of my life making sure the Trial Match tradition stays. It's the only chance we've got to keep the regiment from forgetting its roots."

"I see. So, in a couple of Call-Ups, we'll be right back where we started. Officers sipping amasec in their private quarters while the common soldiers rot in their filthy cots. You do what you want, but I'm spending the rest of my life making sure the Trial Match tradition continues. It's the only chance we have of keeping the regiment from forgetting its roots."

"That is the kind of order I fear. It will grind my regiment to dust. If not literally, then spiritually, no doubt about it. The commanders of future Call-Ups will be unrecognisable, won't they? They'll be drinking amasec and living in private quarters while the ordinary soldiers sleep in dirty bunks. I'd rather go back to Zarkov."

"I see. So, in a couple of generations, we'll be right back where we started. Officers sipping amasec in their private quarters while the common soldiers rot on filthy cots. You do what you want, but I'm spending the rest of my life making sure the Trial Match tradition stays. It's the only chance we've got to keep the regiment from forgetting its roots."

"I see. So, in a couple of Call-Ups, we'll be right back where we started. Officers sipping amasec in their private quarters while the common soldiers rot in their filthy cots. You do what you want, but I'm spending the rest of my life making sure the Trial Match tradition continues. It's the only chance we have of keeping the regiment from forgetting its roots."

languages.text: 「それは恐ろしい命令だ。私の連隊は粉々に砕かれるだろう。少なくとも精神的には、それは間違いない。将来の召集令の指揮官は、もはや見慣れた顔ではないだろう。彼らは甘酒を飲み、私室で暮らしている。兵士たちは汚い寝床で眠っている。私はザルコフに帰りたい」
languages.original_text: "That is the kind of order I fear. It will grind my regiment to dust. If not literally, then spiritually, no doubt about it. The commanders of future Call-Ups will be unrecognisable, won't they? They'll be drinking amasec and living in private quarters while the ordinary soldiers sleep in dirty bunks. I'd rather go back to Zarkov."

languages.text: "Anlıyorum. Yani birkaç Sevk Grubu sonra tam da başladığımız yere döneceğiz. Subaylar özel kamaralarında amasek yudumlarken sıradan askerler pis ranzalarında çürüyecek. Siz ne isterseniz yapın ama ben hayatımın geri kalanını Sınav Karşılaşması geleneğinin devam etmesini sağlamaya adayacağım. Alayın köklerini unutmasını engellemek için elimizdeki tek şans bu."
languages.original_text: "I see. So, in a couple of Call-Ups, we'll be right back where we started. Officers sipping amasec in their private quarters while the common soldiers rot in their filthy cots. You do what you want, but I'm spending the rest of my life making sure the Trial Match tradition continues. It's the only chance we have of keeping the regiment from forgetting its roots."

traits.locale_text: "Anlıyorum. Yani birkaç Sevk Grubu sonra tam da başladığımız yere döneceğiz. Subaylar özel kamaralarında amasek yudumlarken sıradan askerler pis ranzalarında çürüyecek. Siz ne isterseniz yapın ama ben hayatımın geri kalanını Sınav Karşılaşması geleneğinin devam etmesini sağlamaya adayacağım. Alayın köklerini unutmasını engellemek için elimizdeki tek şans bu."

languages.text: “我明白了。所以再过几轮征召，我们又会回到原点。军官在独立舱室里啜饮艾玛赛克酒，而普通士兵在肮脏的床铺上腐烂。您想怎么做随您，但我会用余下的人生确保‘试炼比武’的传统延续下去。这是防止军团忘本的唯一办法。”
languages.original_text: "I see. So, in a couple of Call-Ups, we'll be right back where we started. Officers sipping amasec in their private quarters while the common soldiers rot in their filthy cots. You do what you want, but I'm spending the rest of my life making sure the Trial Match tradition continues. It's the only chance we have of keeping the regiment from forgetting its roots."

traits.locale_text: “我明白了。所以再过几轮征召，我们又会回到原点。军官在独立舱室里啜饮艾玛赛克酒，而普通士兵在肮脏的床铺上腐烂。您想怎么做随您，但我会用余下的人生确保‘试炼比武’的传统延续下去。这是防止军团忘本的唯一办法。”

languages.text: "Ich verstehe. Ein paar Einberufungen später stehen wir also wieder ganz am Anfang. Offiziere schlürfen in ihren privaten Gemächern Amasec, während die einfachen Soldaten auf ihren verwanzten Pritschen verrotten. Macht Ihr, was Ihr wollt, aber ich werde für den Rest meines Lebens dafür sorgen, dass die Tradition des Prüfungskampfes gewahrt wird. Nur mit ihm können wir verhindern, dass das Regiment seine Wurzeln vergisst."
languages.original_text: "I see. So, in a couple of Call-Ups, we'll be right back where we started. Officers sipping amasec in their private quarters while the common soldiers rot in their filthy cots. You do what you want, but I'm spending the rest of my life making sure the Trial Match tradition continues. It's the only chance we have of keeping the regiment from forgetting its roots."

traits.locale_text: "Ich verstehe. Ein paar Einberufungen später stehen wir also wieder ganz am Anfang. Offiziere schlürfen in ihren privaten Gemächern Amasec, während die einfachen Soldaten auf ihren verwanzten Pritschen verrotten. Macht Ihr, was Ihr wollt, aber ich werde für den Rest meines Lebens dafür sorgen, dass die Tradition des Prüfungskampfes gewahrt wird. Nur mit ihm können wir verhindern, dass das Regiment seine Wurzeln vergisst."

languages.text: « Je vois. Dans quelques Mobilisations, retour à la case départ. Les officiers se saouleront à l'amasec dans leurs quartiers privés pendant que les soldats ordinaires devront dormir sur des couchettes sales. Faites comme bon vous semble, mais je compte passer le restant de mes jours à faire perdurer la tradition de l'Épreuve. C'est notre seul espoir de ne pas oublier nos racines. »
languages.original_text: "I see. So, in a couple of Call-Ups, we'll be right back where we started. Officers sipping amasec in their private quarters while the common soldiers rot in their filthy cots. You do what you want, but I'm spending the rest of my life making sure the Trial Match tradition continues. It's the only chance we have of keeping the regiment from forgetting its roots."

traits.locale_text: « Je vois. Dans quelques Mobilisations, retour à la case départ. Les officiers se saouleront à l'amasec dans leurs quartiers privés pendant que les soldats ordinaires devront dormir sur des couchettes sales. Faites comme bon vous semble, mais je compte passer le restant de mes jours à faire perdurer la tradition de l'Épreuve. C'est notre seul espoir de ne pas oublier nos racines. »

languages.text: «Ya veo. Entonces, en un par de llamados, estaremos exactamente donde empezamos: con oficiales bebiendo amasec en sus camarotes mientras los soldados rasos se pudren en catres nauseabundos. Haga lo que quiera, pero yo me pasaré el resto de la vida asegurándome de que la tradición de la prueba de combate perdura. Es la única forma de que el regimiento no olvide sus raíces».
languages.original_text: "I see. So, in a couple of Call-Ups, we'll be right back where we started. Officers sipping amasec in their private quarters while the common soldiers rot in their filthy cots. You do what you want, but I'm spending the rest of my life making sure the Trial Match tradition continues. It's the only chance we have of keeping the regiment from forgetting its roots."
